# third_party

Reference material only — nothing here is built, linked, or licensed as part
of Manatee. Run `./import.sh` to clone/update everything (and to regenerate
the Stationeers decompilation, below).

| Directory | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| `ElectricalAge/` | Current Electrical Age (Minecraft). `docs/examples/` is the Falstad lesson corpus format we adopt. |
| `revolt/` | Sukasa's Re-Volt mod (Stationeers) — the integration target for manatee-core there. |
| `sparky/` | Our own Vintage Story prototype. Design reference only; code is not reused. |
| `vsapi/`, `vsessentialsmod/`, `vssurvivalmod/` | Public Vintage Story engine source. |
| `stationeers-decomp/` | **Generated, gitignored** — ILSpy decompilation of the installed game's `Assembly-CSharp.dll`. |

## Stationeers decompilation notes

- Generated by `import.sh` from the local Steam install
  (`STATIONEERS_DIR` env var overrides the path); regenerated only when the
  DLL's sha256 changes (stamp file `.dll-sha256` in the output dir).
  Takes a few minutes; ~3,500 files.
- Uses `ilspycmd` if on PATH, else `nix run nixpkgs#ilspycmd --`. The nixpkgs
  version (9.1) prints an update nag against 10.x — harmless, output is fine.
- The `-p` flag emits a whole project: namespaces become directory paths
  (e.g. `Assets.Scripts.Networks` → `Assets.Scripts.Networks/`).
- **Decompiled code can contain artifacts — verify before relying on
  oddities.** Concrete example: `GameManager.GameTick`'s tick-pacing loop
  reads `Stopwatch.Elapsed.Milliseconds` (the 0–999 component) where
  `TotalMilliseconds` is plainly intended, which would make a >1 s tick wait
  *longer*. That may be a real upstream bug or an ILSpy 9.1 artifact — check
  the IL (`ilspycmd -il`) before citing behavior that hinges on
  suspicious-looking code.
- **Never commit this directory and never copy decompiled code into Manatee
  source** — it is proprietary RocketWerkz code, present locally strictly to
  answer integration questions (threading model, tick scheduling, API
  surfaces). Findings go into `docs/` as facts with file:line references;
  see the Threading section of `docs/stationeers.md` for the pattern.
